name: What's Your Friendship Style?
description: Discover how you naturally form and maintain platonic relationships

companion.title: The Loyal Confidant
companion.description: You form deep, lasting friendships built on mutual trust and emotional support. Your friends know they can always count on you through life's ups and downs.
companion.strengths: Loyalty, emotional support, dependability, deep connection
companion.challenges: May take on others' emotional burdens

adventurer.title: The Fun Catalyst
adventurer.description: You're the friend who brings energy and spontaneity to relationships. Your friendships are built on shared experiences, adventures, and creating memorable moments.
adventurer.strengths: Spontaneity, fun, social energy, creating joy

connector.title: The Social Networker
connector.description: You maintain a wide circle of diverse friendships and enjoy bringing people together. Your strength is creating community and facilitating connections between others.
connector.challenges: May struggle with deep one-on-one intimacy

independent.title: The Low-Maintenance Friend
independent.description: You value friendships that allow for autonomy and don't require constant contact. Your friends appreciate your authenticity and lack of social pressure.
independent.strengths: Authenticity, respect for autonomy, no drama, reliability
independent.challenges: May be perceived as distant or uninterested

questions.question: Your ideal friend hangout involves:
options: Deep one-on-one conversation
An exciting group activity
A dinner party with diverse people
Occasional meaningful catch-ups

questions.question: How do you prefer to meet new people?
options: At large parties and bustling social events
In small, intimate gatherings with meaningful conversation
During spontaneous adventures and unexpected encounters
Through structured group activities and clubs

questions.question: What kind of friend do you aspire to be?
options: The energetic connector who lights up every room
A trusted confidant who listens deeply
The adventurous spirit who brings excitement
A reliable supporter who's always there

questions.question: How do you usually resolve conflicts among friends?
options: By initiating group discussions to clear the air
By having a one-on-one, heart-to-heart conversation
By suggesting an impromptu outing to lighten the mood
By stepping in as a calm and steady mediator

questions.question: What's your ideal way to celebrate a friend's success?
options: Throwing a big party or social bash
Sharing a quiet moment with personal congratulations
Taking them on an unexpected adventure
Offering steady support with a heartfelt toast

questions.question: How do you keep in touch with your friends?
options: By constantly engaging on social media and attending events
Through regular, in-depth conversations
Via spontaneous meet-ups and surprise visits
By maintaining a steady, reliable check-in routine

questions.question: What activities do you most enjoy with your friends?
options: Attending lively social events and parties
Having deep conversations over coffee
Embarking on unplanned adventures
Meeting regularly for a dependable catch-up

questions.question: When making plans with friends, you prefer:
options: Energetic, impromptu meet-ups at popular spots
Cozy gatherings where everyone shares deeply
Unexpected adventures that break the routine
Regular, well-organized get-togethers you can count on

questions.question: How do you show appreciation for your friends?
options: By celebrating them publicly with big gestures
By offering heartfelt compliments in private
By surprising them with spontaneous outings
By consistently being there with practical help

questions.question: When a friend is struggling, you tend to:
options: Organize a social outing to lift their spirits
Sit down for a deep, personal conversation
Invite them on an unexpected, fun adventure
Offer steady, unwavering support and guidance

questions.question: What do you value most in your friendships?
options: The excitement of a vibrant social circle
Deep emotional connections and trust
The thrill of unexpected adventures
Loyalty, reliability, and consistent support
